metadata.description: Metalogica's plugin marketplace. Currently hosts substrate — a full-stack Vite + Convex + Clerk scaffold with DDD, railway-oriented programming, and a testing pyramid.

plugins.name: substrate
plugins.description: Scaffold full-stack Vite + Convex + Clerk apps from concept to production in 15 minutes. Six skills cover the full pipeline — init, migrate, architect-spec, execute, quick-spec, deploy — grounded in Domain-Driven Design, railway-oriented programming, a testing pyramid, and a Gemini AI Studio Build handoff.
